# databases corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === Connection strings ===
# expect: JDBC Connection String with Password
# expect: ODBC/SQLServer Connection String
# expect: AMQP Connection String with Credentials
# expect: Kafka SASL Connection String
jdbc:postgresql://db.example.com:5432/app?user=u&password=s3cretValue
Server=tcp:sql.example.com,1433;Database=app;User Id=admin;Password=Hunter2Pass;
amqps://guest:s3cretpw@rabbit.example.com:5671/vhost
SASL_SSL://svcuser:s3cretpw@broker.example.com:9092

# === Hosted DB URLs ===
# expect: ClickHouse Cloud URL with Credentials
# expect: Elasticsearch URL with Credentials
# expect: MongoDB Atlas SRV Host
https://admin:s3cretpw@abc-xyz.clickhouse.cloud:8443/
https://elastic:s3cretpw@my-deploy.es.us-east-1.elastic-cloud.com:9243
cluster0.ab1cd.mongodb.net

# === Platform tokens ===
# expect: Databricks OAuth Token
# expect: PlanetScale Database Password
# expect: Neon Project API Key
# expect: CockroachDB Cloud API Key
# expect: FaunaDB Server Key
doseabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789AB
pscale_pw_Aa0Bb1Cc2Dd3Ee4Ff5Gg6Hh7
napi_aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
CCDB1_abcdefgh12345678_ijklmnop87654321
fnAABBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBB

# === More platform tokens ===
# expect: Firebase Cloud Messaging Server Key (legacy)
# expect: Firebase Database URL with Secret
# expect: MotherDuck Service Token
AAAAabcdefg:APA91bzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzzz
https://my-app.firebaseio.com/users.json?auth=abcdEFGH1234567890
motherduck_token=eyJaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa

# === Service tokens ===
# expect: Convex Deploy Key
# expect: Xata API Key
# expect: Upstash Redis REST Token
prod:my-app:aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
xau_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN=A1b2C3d4E5f6G7h8I9j0K1l2M3n4O5p6Q7r8S9t0U1V2

# === Supabase / PlanetScale / InfluxDB3 (Block 3a) ===
# expect: Supabase Secret Key
# expect: Supabase Publishable Key
# expect: Supabase Service Key (legacy sbp_)
# expect: PlanetScale Database Token
# expect: PlanetScale OAuth Token
# expect: InfluxDB v3 API Token
sb_secret_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
sb_publishable_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
sbp_aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
pscale_tkn_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
pscale_oauth_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
apiv3_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
